summary: Created tools/factory/derive.ts (derivation script) and tools/factory/validate.ts (validation script). Added factory:derive and factory:validate scripts to root package.json. Added factory-validation job to CI workflow (advisory, continue-on-error). Derivation implements all DR rules including risk-proportional auto-acceptance. Validation enforces FI-1 through FI-5.

verification.notes: Factory scripts are standalone (no monorepo imports). Existing build/test/lint unaffected.
